creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 174904
switch to USE_GITHUB

In r422140 devel/qtscriptgenerator was marked BROKEN, as GOOGLE_CODE has gone swimming with the fishes. 

The project is available on github via qt-labs projects [1] which seems reasonably official.


The attached patch fetches from the last commit made into the repo.


[1] https://github.com/qt-labs/qtscriptgenerator
